query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph showing a human shadow cast on a textured wall between two brick columns. On the right, part of a person's face and sneakers are visible behind the edge of the brick column. The bricks display distinct horizontal mortar lines and varied surface texture.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph exhibiting obstructed cropping and atmospheric distress, showing a human shadow cast on a textured wall between two brick columns. A second person stands largely concealed behind the right column, with only a portion of their face and sneakers visible at the frame edge, creating a sense of withheld information and voyeuristic tension. The narrow corridor between walls and stark tonal contrasts contribute to an uneasy, unsettling mood.
